title: Suggestions
description: Output of bin/suggest-profile-updates.sh — profile-update suggestions derived from devDependencies, config files, and recent git history. Consumed by skills/suggest/SKILL.md. Top-level value is an array (the script does not wrap it in an object) so consumers must handle 0..N items.

signal.description: What in the repo triggered the suggestion (e.g. 'eslint dependency in package.json').

oneOf.description: Empty object when the suggestion is informational and has no programmatic add target.
